### Post by gralco on 2009-04-29
```
bash: 00000062dea25a01000000480000000100000002000000050000001c000000000000000b6ca038b966a828c02b2828282828280100000062dea25a01000000140000000100000001000105000000000901010000000000
ADD 4177526931 def /apps/bluetooth-manager IOR:
ADD 3523215470 def /apps/compiz/general/screen0/options IOR:
ADD 3623878772 def /apps/compiz IOR:
ADD 83886235 def /apps/compiz/plugins/decoration/allscreens/options IOR:
ADD 335544364 def /apps/evolution/calendar/sources IOR:010000001700000049444c3a436f6e6669674c697374656e65723a312e300000030000000054424f540000000101020005000000554e4958000000000a0000006c6f63616c686f7374000000290000002f746d702f6f726269742d657269632f6c696e632d6463612d302d32376434316631643833363739000000000000: No such file or directory
```

Help me fix them please!

---

### Post by Brandon Williams on 2009-04-30
Post the contents of these files and we may be able to help: $HOME/.bashrc, $HOME/.bash_profile, $HOME/.profile, and /etc/profile.

---
